# MyRealProduct

> MyRealProduct is an AI education platform that teaches engineers how to build, ship, and deploy end-to-end AI products. Founded by Hari Prasad, a TEDx speaker and AI educator who has coached 2,000+ engineers.

## What We Do

MyRealProduct runs a 4-week live cohort where software engineers and aspiring AI builders learn to build real AI-powered products from scratch. The program covers AI Agents, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), LLMs, AWS deployment, and go-to-market strategy.

Unlike courses that teach theory, MyRealProduct focuses on shipping real products that solve real problems.

## Who It's For

- Software engineers wanting to break into AI
- Developers who want to build and launch AI products
- Founders building AI-powered startups
- Anyone who wants to go from zero to a deployed AI product in 4 weeks

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.myrealproduct.com/): Main landing page with cohort details, curriculum, testimonials, and pricing
- [Enterprise](https://www.myrealproduct.com/enterprise): Personalised AI training for non-technical business teams — Marketing, Finance, Legal, HR, and Operations. Custom curriculum, live workshops, and an ongoing monthly retainer. Based in London, UK, available virtually worldwide.
- [Podcast](https://www.myrealproduct.com/podcast): The MRP Podcast — real conversations with AI engineers and founders on how AI products are actually built
- [Free Book](https://www.myrealproduct.com/book): A free 31-day guide to building your first AI product

## About the Founder

Hari Prasad is an AI engineer, TEDx speaker, and educator who has helped 2,000+ people break into AI. He has worked with 5+ early-stage startups to launch their first AI-powered products.

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hariprasad20/
- Email: contact@myrealproduct.com

## The MRP Podcast

"The MRP Podcast" (also known as the ReAlity Show) features unfiltered conversations with AI builders — founders, engineers, and practitioners sharing the real story behind building AI products. Hosted by Hari Prasad. Episodes air weekly, ~60 minutes each.

## Enterprise AI Training

MyRealProduct offers bespoke AI training programmes for businesses and non-technical teams. We map your team's workflows, build a custom curriculum around your actual use cases, and deliver live hands-on workshops. Post-training, we offer a monthly retainer for ongoing workflow audits, AI tool updates, and always-on support.

- Target teams: Marketing, Finance, Legal, HR, Operations
- Tools covered: Claude Code, Cursor, n8n, OpenAI, LangChain, LangGraph, Agentic AI, MCP, GitHub Copilot, Gemini
- Integrates with: Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, Notion, Microsoft 365, Google Workspace
- Location: London, UK and Virtual Worldwide
- Contact: contact@myrealproduct.com

## Key Topics Covered

AI product development, LLMs, AI agents, RAG, vector databases, AWS deployment, AI startups, breaking into AI, AI engineering, go-to-market for AI products, enterprise AI training, AI upskilling for teams, workplace AI adoption, business AI transformation
